calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Kathryn Ann Stebner appearing via zoom for Carol Lucey.
Carmen Guadani appearing in person for and with Nathaniel Lucey appearing in person.

The Court stated that this is very sad circumstances, asked the parties if they are aware of anyone objecting to the petition and asked what date of death is being requested. Mrs. Guadani stated that there are no objections. Mrs. Stebner stated that the date of the order should be the date of death. The Peition for the fact of death is taken under submission. The Court stated it will indicate a date of death of May 10, 2023.

Judge; Ross Moody; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Choi; Not reported.
